opinion.h: Margaret GATELY, petitioner, v. Edith HARITON et al. No. 488.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. James P. Burns, for petitioner.

The motion to dispense with printing the record is granted. The petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia is denied.[ Gately v. Hariton 332 U.S. 8 55 (1948) ]
